channel.title: ONTAP on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in ONTAP on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Generally Available: Azure NetApp Files migration assistant
item.description:
Azure NetApp Files migration assistant is in preview and available generally, using SnapMirror for data migration to ANF. It supports migrations from on-premises systems and from CVO or other cloud providers.

  • Source: Azure Updates
